---
title: Anatomy of a modular toolchain for reproducible bioinformatics workflows
author: Kelly Sovacool, Samarth Mathur, Vishal Koparde, Parthav Jailwala
date: 2026-03-31
date-format: medium
---

{{< include _bosc-2026.txt >}}

<hr>


```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
with open('_bosc-2026.txt', 'r') as infile:
    words = [word for line in infile for word in line.split()]
word_count = len(words)
max_words = 250

if word_count > max_words:
    word_count = f"**{word_count}**"
print(f"word count: {word_count} / {max_words}")
```

poster: [PDF](/poster/BOSC-2026-poster-sovacool.pdf)
